ON MATCH SET tech_attach.summary = CASE WHEN (tech_attach.summary IS NULL OR tech_attach.summary = '') THEN 'RAR and ISO attachments used in phishing messages to deliver malicious payloads.' ELSE tech_attach.summary END

MERGE (sector_travel:Sector {name:'Transportation'})
MERGE (sector_hosp:Sector {name:'Other'})

MERGE (ta558)-[camp_incl:includes]->(camp1)
ON CREATE SET camp_incl.evidence = 'TA558 has ramped up campaigns targeting travel and hospitality using fake reservation emails with links and RAR/ISO attachments.',
              camp_incl.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET camp_incl.evidence = CASE WHEN (camp_incl.evidence IS NULL OR camp_incl.evidence = '') THEN 'TA558 has ramped up campaigns targeting travel and hospitality using fake reservation emails with links and RAR/ISO attachments.' ELSE camp_incl.evidence END,
             camp_incl.source_id = CASE WHEN (camp_incl.source_id IS NULL OR camp_incl.source_id = '') THEN src1.id ELSE camp_incl.source_id END

MERGE (camp1)-[sup1:supported_by]->(src1)
ON CREATE SET sup1.quote = 'TA558 has ramped up efforts to target the travel and hospitality industries... revamped their 2018 campaigns with fake reservation emails... use of RAR and ISO file attachments linked to messages.'
ON MATCH SET sup1.quote = CASE WHEN (sup1.quote IS NULL OR sup1.quote = '') THEN 'TA558 has ramped up efforts to target the travel and hospitality industries... revamped their 2018 campaigns with fake reservation emails... use of RAR and ISO file attachments linked to messages.' ELSE sup1.quote END

MERGE (ta558)-[sup2:supported_by]->(src1)
ON CREATE SET sup2.quote = 'A longtime threat group identified as TA558 has ramped up efforts to target the travel and hospitality industries.'
ON MATCH SET sup2.quote = CASE WHEN (sup2.quote IS NULL OR sup2.quote = '') THEN 'A longtime threat group identified as TA558 has ramped up efforts to target the travel and hospitality industries.' ELSE sup2.quote END

MERGE (camp1)-[camp_targets_travel:targets]->(sector_travel)
ON CREATE SET camp_targets_travel.evidence = 'Campaign targets travel-related organizations (airline bookings).',
              camp_targets_travel.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET camp_targets_travel.evidence = CASE WHEN (camp_targets_travel.evidence IS NULL OR camp_targets_travel.evidence = '') THEN 'Campaign targets travel-related organizations (airline bookings).' ELSE camp_targets_travel.evidence END,
             camp_targets_travel.source_id = CASE WHEN (camp_targets_travel.source_id IS NULL OR camp_targets_travel.source_id = '') THEN src1.id ELSE camp_targets_travel.source_id END

MERGE (camp1)-[camp_targets_hosp:targets]->(sector_hosp)
ON CREATE SET camp_targets_hosp.evidence = 'Campaign targets hospitality-related organizations (hotel bookings).',
              camp_targets_hosp.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET camp_targets_hosp.evidence = CASE WHEN (camp_targets_hosp.evidence IS NULL OR camp_targets_hosp.evidence = '') THEN 'Campaign targets hospitality-related organizations (hotel bookings).' ELSE camp_targets_hosp.evidence END,
             camp_targets_hosp.source_id = CASE WHEN (camp_targets_hosp.source_id IS NULL OR camp_targets_hosp.source_id = '') THEN src1.id ELSE camp_targets_hosp.source_id END

MERGE (inc1:Incident {id:'proofpoint-ta558-travel-hospitality-campaign'})
ON CREATE SET inc1.type = 'intrusion',
              inc1.summary = 'TA558 ramped up a campaign using fake reservation emails with links and RAR/ISO attachments delivering multiple malware variants to travel and hospitality targets.'
ON MATCH SET inc1.type = CASE WHEN (inc1.type IS NULL OR inc1.type = '') THEN 'intrusion' ELSE inc1.type END,
             inc1.summary = CASE WHEN (inc1.summary IS NULL OR inc1.summary = '') THEN 'TA558 ramped up a campaign using fake reservation emails with links and RAR/ISO attachments delivering multiple malware variants to travel and hospitality targets.' ELSE inc1.summary END

MERGE (inc1)-[attr1:attributed_to]->(ta558)
ON CREATE SET attr1.confidence = 'medium',
              attr1.evidence = 'Security researchers report TA558 cybercriminals ramped up the campaign using fake reservation emails and RAR/ISO attachments.',
              attr1.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET attr1.confidence = CASE WHEN (attr1.confidence IS NULL OR attr1.confidence = '') THEN 'medium' ELSE attr1.confidence END,
             attr1.evidence = CASE WHEN (attr1.evidence IS NULL OR attr1.evidence = '') THEN 'Security researchers report TA558 cybercriminals ramped up the campaign using fake reservation emails and RAR/ISO attachments.' ELSE attr1.evidence END,
             attr1.source_id = CASE WHEN (attr1.source_id IS NULL OR attr1.source_id = '') THEN src1.id ELSE attr1.source_id END

MERGE (inc1)-[inc_targets_travel:targets_sector]->(sector_travel)
MERGE (inc1)-[inc_targets_hosp:targets_sector]->(sector_hosp)

MERGE (inc1)-[inc_tech1:used_technique]->(tech_phish)
ON CREATE SET inc_tech1.phase = 'Initial Access',
              inc_tech1.details = 'Fake reservation emails used to lure travel and hospitality targets.',
              inc_tech1.evidence = 'Fake reservation emails used in the campaign.',
              inc_tech1.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET inc_tech1.phase = CASE WHEN (inc_tech1.phase IS NULL OR inc_tech1.phase = '') THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE inc_tech1.phase END,
             inc_tech1.details = CASE WHEN (inc_tech1.details IS NULL OR inc_tech1.details = '') THEN 'Fake reservation emails used to lure travel and hospitality targets.' ELSE inc_tech1.details END,
             inc_tech1.evidence = CASE WHEN (inc_tech1.evidence IS NULL OR inc_tech1.evidence = '') THEN 'Fake reservation emails used in the campaign.' ELSE inc_tech1.evidence END,
             inc_tech1.source_id = CASE WHEN (inc_tech1.source_id IS NULL OR inc_tech1.source_id = '') THEN src1.id ELSE inc_tech1.source_id END

MERGE (inc1)-[inc_tech2:used_technique]->(tech_spear)
ON CREATE SET inc_tech2.phase = 'Initial Access',
              inc_tech2.details = 'Links in emails deliver malicious malware payloads when clicked.',
              inc_tech2.evidence = 'Emails contain links that, if clicked, deliver a malicious payload.',
              inc_tech2.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET inc_tech2.phase = CASE WHEN (inc_tech2.phase IS NULL OR inc_tech2.phase = '') THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE inc_tech2.phase END,
             inc_tech2.details = CASE WHEN (inc_tech2.details IS NULL OR inc_tech2.details = '') THEN 'Links in emails deliver malicious malware payloads when clicked.' ELSE inc_tech2.details END,
             inc_tech2.evidence = CASE WHEN (inc_tech2.evidence IS NULL OR inc_tech2.evidence = '') THEN 'Emails contain links that, if clicked, deliver a malicious payload.' ELSE inc_tech2.evidence END,
             inc_tech2.source_id = CASE WHEN (inc_tech2.source_id IS NULL OR inc_tech2.source_id = '') THEN src1.id ELSE inc_tech2.source_id END

MERGE (inc1)-[inc_tech3:used_technique]->(tech_attach)
ON CREATE SET inc_tech3.phase = 'Initial Access',
              inc_tech3.details = 'RAR and ISO attachments linked to messages; executing decompresses contents.',
              inc_tech3.evidence = 'Use of RAR and ISO file attachments linked to messages.',
              inc_tech3.source_id = src1.id
ON MATCH SET inc_tech3.phase = CASE WHEN (inc_tech3.phase IS NULL OR inc_tech3.phase = '') THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE inc_tech3.phase END,
             inc_tech3.details = CASE WHEN (inc_tech3.details IS NULL OR inc_tech3.details = '') THEN 'RAR and ISO attachments linked to messages; executing decompresses contents.' ELSE inc_tech3.details END,
             inc_tech3.evidence = CASE WHEN (inc_tech3.evidence IS NULL OR inc_tech3.evidence = '') THEN 'Use of RAR and ISO file attachments linked to messages.' ELSE inc_tech3.evidence END,
             inc_tech3.source_id = CASE WHEN (inc_tech3.source_id IS NULL OR inc_tech3.source_id = '') THEN src1.id ELSE inc_tech3.source_id END

MERGE (inc1)-[sup3:supported_by]->(src1)
ON CREATE SET sup3.quote = 'Warnings come from security researchers who say TA558 cybercriminals have revamped their 2018 campaigns with fake reservation emails that contain links... What makes this most recent campaign unique... is the use of RAR and ISO file attachments linked to messages.'
ON MATCH SET sup3.quote = CASE WHEN (sup3.quote IS NULL OR sup3.quote = '') THEN 'Warnings come from security researchers who say TA558 cybercriminals have revamped their 2018 campaigns with fake reservation emails that contain links... What makes this most recent campaign unique... is the use of RAR and ISO file attachments linked to messages.' ELSE sup3.quote END
